title: Anthropic Claude Sonnet 5 now available as a Databricks-hosted model ​
body:
**June 30, 2026**

Model Serving now supports Anthropic [Claude Sonnet 5](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis/supported-models#claude-sonnet-5) as a Databricks-hosted model. Designed for coding, agentic workflows, and professional work at scale, Claude Sonnet 5 delivers near-Opus-level intelligence with Sonnet's cost efficiency and speed. You can access this model using [Foundation Model APIs](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis/).

Customers are responsible for ensuring their compliance with [applicable terms](/aws/en/machine-learning/model-serving/acceptable-use-models).
